expectations.text: Output contains at least 10 distinct hooks
No hooks start with 'Are you...' (tired generic AI ad opener)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared
none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Hooks include concrete specifics (numbers, names, objects, situations) not vague claims
expectations.evidence: 11pm Tuesday, 14 months, 47 decisions, Whole Foods parking lot, almond milk, 4pm call, Stripe

expectations.text: Output uses VARIETY of psychological trigger types (not all the same category)
expectations.evidence: Varied scenes: payroll secrecy, friend dinner, co-founder q, decision load, relationship cost, numbness, crying, isolation

expectations.text: Hooks feel native to the given persona's voice/context (not generic ad copy)
expectations.evidence: Stripe, term sheet, payroll, board call, co-founder, Slack — founder-native vocabulary

expectations.text: Hooks do NOT mention therapy, mental health, or the product directly (unaware stage)
expectations.evidence: No therapy, mental health, or product mention in any hook

expectations.text: Hooks name specific founder situations (Slack at midnight, decision fatigue, board calls, cap tables, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Payroll, board call, term sheet, Stripe, 47 decisions, co-founder, Slack notification

expectations.text: No hooks use 'Do you feel...' template opener
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared
